industries.heading: Built for your industry
industries.subheading: Harmoniq adapts to the specific safety requirements of your sector

feature_cards.incident_desc: Report incidents from any device with automatic severity classification and routing to the right team.
feature_cards.asset_desc: Track every asset from acquisition to retirement. QR code scanning, automated inspection schedules, and maintenance history.
feature_cards.risk_desc: Built-in forms for JHA, JSA, RI&E, Arbowet, and more. Country-specific compliance workflows.
feature_cards.analytics_desc: Spot patterns before they become problems. Real-time dashboards, trend analysis, and exportable reports.

faq_section.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq_section.a1: Sign up for a free account and get started with your first safety inspection in minutes. No credit card required.
faq_section.q2: Which compliance standards do you support?
faq_section.a2: Harmoniq supports OSHA (US), Arbowet/RI&E (Netherlands), AFS/SAM (Sweden), and ISO 45001 with country-specific forms and workflows.
faq_section.a3: Yes. The mobile app works offline and automatically syncs when connectivity is restored, ensuring field workers can always report and inspect.
faq_section.a4: Currently available in English, Dutch, and Swedish, with locale-aware dates, numbers, and compliance forms for each region.

cta.heading: Ready to transform your safety operations?
cta.subheading: Join thousands of safety professionals using Harmoniq to protect their teams.
